minimum_image_evidence: At least one image must show the claimed object and the relevant part clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
Each image is judged on its own; at least one relevant, in-focus image must show the claimed object or part well enough to evaluate the claim.
The claimed car panel, bumper, or door must be visible at an angle where surface marks or deformation can be assessed.
The claimed laptop screen, keyboard, hinge, or body area must be visible clearly enough to inspect cracks, missing keys, or surface damage.
The relevant package surface must be visible; for missing- or damaged-contents claims the opened package and contents area must also be shown.
Submitted images must be usable, relevant to the claim, and grounded in the claimed object to be treated as evidence.
